overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing exploration of a futuristic Japanese-inspired commercial district. The scene blends traditional wooden temple architecture with cyberpunk elements like neon vending machines and holographic signs, following a character through gravel courtyards and covered walkways during bright midday sun.

events.description: passes under wooden gateway structure into covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: following a character in white clothing through a gravel courtyard lined with vending machines and traditional wooden architecture

notable_agents.action: character in white outfit walking ahead through the courtyard
cybernetically modified person with glowing green arm tattoos standing near a pillar

entered.detail: large wall of illuminated vending machines displaying various products
traditional Japanese wooden torii-style gateway structure
raised concrete platform with steps in the center of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens following a character past a wall of futuristic vending machines in a sunlit courtyard. The camera moves through a gravel area toward a wooden gateway, passing a stationary NPC with glowing green cybernetic tattoos, and enters a semi-covered walkway with traditional Japanese architectural elements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service corridor with vending machines

events.description: turns right past stone lantern into narrower corridor with arcade machines
approaches yellow construction barriers blocking the path ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through a covered walkway past vending machines and arcade games toward a dead end

entered.detail: traditional Japanese stone lantern with curved roof
green and red vending machine labeled BURRITO XXL with food advertisements
bright yellow and black striped barrier wall blocking the corridor end

segments.scene_description: Moving through a covered corridor, the camera passes a traditional stone lantern and turns toward vending machines including a prominent Burrito XXL machine. The path ends at yellow construction barriers, creating a dead end in the narrow service corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden walkway with potted plants and hanging lanterns

events.description: turns left from gravel onto wooden deck walkway lined with potted plants
moves into area with blue hanging lanterns creating dappled light patterns

agents.ego_description: walking along a wooden deck pathway lined with concrete planters and bamboo plants under blue hanging lanterns

entered.detail: elevated wooden walkway with red border trim
large bamboo plants in rectangular concrete planters
traditional square blue lanterns hanging from the ceiling in a row

segments.scene_description: The camera turns onto a wooden deck walkway flanked by concrete planters with bamboo and palm plants. Blue hanging lanterns create a rhythmic pattern overhead as the camera moves through this serene, plant-lined corridor with traditional architectural columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: traditional temple courtyard with stone lanterns

events.description: emerges from covered walkway into open courtyard with traditional pavilions
futuristic cityscape with neon billboards becomes visible in the background behind traditional architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through an open gravel courtyard with traditional Japanese pavilions and stone lanterns, heading toward a covered walkway

entered.detail: wooden pavilion with curved Japanese roof and open sides
traditional stone lanterns scattered throughout the gravel courtyard
tall modern buildings with holographic advertisements visible behind the traditional structures
bright red traditional Japanese gate structure

segments.scene_description: Emerging into a sunlit open courtyard, the scene reveals traditional Japanese pavilions with curved roofs set among gravel and stone lanterns. In the background, a stark contrast appears with a futuristic cyberpunk skyline featuring neon billboards and holographic displays visible above the traditional architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered ceremonial corridor with hanging decorations

events.description: enters covered corridor with red banners and hanging paper lanterns
begins following two NPCs walking ahead in the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through an ornate covered corridor following two pedestrians, observing the hanging decorations and grid windows

notable_agents.action: person in gray outfit walking ahead while adjusting their collar
person in beige coat walking ahead through the corridor

entered.detail: long covered walkway with wooden ceiling and hanging decorations
rows of white paper lanterns suspended from the ceiling with red and black streamers
vertical red fabric banners hanging along the right wall
wooden lattice windows showing the street outside

segments.scene_description: Entering a dimly lit covered corridor, the camera moves through a space adorned with hanging paper lanterns and red banners. The wooden lattice windows on the left reveal glimpses of the street outside. The camera follows two pedestrians ahead—one in gray adjusting their clothing and another in beige—through this ceremonial passageway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a blend of traditional Japanese architecture and futuristic urban elements, transitioning from sunlit courtyards into intimate covered corridors. It begins by following a character past neon vending machines and a cybernetically tattooed NPC across a gravel courtyard, moving through a wooden gateway into a semi-covered walkway. As the camera navigates a narrow service corridor past a stone lantern and construction barriers, the scene shifts onto a serene wooden deck flanked by bamboo planters and rhythmic blue hanging lanterns. The path then opens back into a bright courtyard featuring curved-roof pavilions set against a stark, holographic cyberpunk skyline before turning once more into a dimly lit ceremonial passageway. Finally, the camera glides under red banners and paper lanterns, following two pedestrians past wooden lattice windows that offer glimpses of the bustling street outside.
